latitudeHelp: Geographic latitude in decimal degrees. North is positive, south is negative. Example: 52.5 (N) for Berlin, -34.6 (S) for Buenos Aires.
latitudeRequiredWhenSystemLocationDisabl: Latitude is required when system location is disabled
longitudeHelp: Geographic longitude in decimal degrees. East is positive, west is negative. Example: 13.4 (E) for Berlin, -58.4 (W) for Buenos Aires.
longitudeRequiredWhenSystemLocationDisab: Longitude is required when system location is disabled
useSystemLocationOrSpecifyCoordinates: Use system location or specify coordinates
